generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? While strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, it's putting unnecessary strain on our economy. We should focus on strengthening our alliances instead of trying to go it alone. #NationalSecurity #EconomicGrowth
